---
title: "Shepards"
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import json
import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
import folium

slug = "shepards"
base = Path("../data/routes") / slug
payload = json.loads((base / "summary.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
summary = payload["summary"]
hazards = pd.read_json(base / "hazards.json")
segments = gpd.read_file(base / "segments.geojson")

HAZARD_COLORS = {
    "steep_climb": "#012C22",
    "climb": "#2D9966",
    "flat": "#31D492",
    "light_descent": "#fee08b",
    "steep_descent": "#f46d43",
    "ultra_steep_descent": "#9F0712",
    "turn_on_descent": "#4F39F6",
    "turn_on_steep_descent": "#8A0194",
}

center = [
    (summary["start"]["lat"] + summary["end"]["lat"]) / 2,
    (summary["start"]["lon"] + summary["end"]["lon"]) / 2,
]
m = folium.Map(location=center, zoom_start=13, tiles="CartoDB positron")
folium.GeoJson(
    segments.to_json(),
    style_function=lambda feature: {
        "color": HAZARD_COLORS.get(feature["properties"]["hazard"], "#666666"),
        "weight": 5,
        "opacity": 0.85,
    },
    tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(fields=["Ride Type", "Grade", "Turn"]),
).add_to(m)
```

## Summary

```{python}
pd.DataFrame(
    [
        ["Distance (mi)", summary["distance_mi"]],
        ["Elevation gain (ft)", summary["elevation_gain_ft"]],
        ["Elevation loss (ft)", summary["elevation_loss_ft"]],
        ["Max elevation (ft)", summary["max_elevation_ft"]],
        ["Segments", summary["segment_count"]],
    ],
    columns=["Metric", "Value"],
)
```

## Hazard Mix

```{python}
hazards[hazards["hazard"] != "TOTAL"]
```

## Route Map

```{python}
m
```
